note: Palo Alto Networks Inc. corporate Workday board. jobs.paloaltonetworks.com embeds paloaltonetworks.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com; site path is panwexternalcareers (NOT 'PaloAltoNetworks', which 404s). Their legacy SmartRecruiters tenant 'paloaltonetworks2' returns 0 (empty/dead). Live fetch returns real PAN roles; keyword='United States' returns full result set (US-inclusive).

Applied Materials Inc. corporate Workday board (amat.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/External). Real AMAT semiconductor roles (Java Tech Lead, Manufacturing Technician, Supplier Engineer). Large global board, US-inclusive.

NXP Semiconductors corporate Workday board (nxp.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/careers). Real NXP roles (Principal Hardware DFT Lead, Lead Design Engineer Functional Validation, AZSS Facilities Engineer). Global board, US-inclusive.

Genpact Ltd. main experienced-hire Workday board (genpact.wd108.myworkdayjobs.com/External_Careers), discovered via www.genpact.com/careers. The 'campussite' site is interns-only; 'gen|wd1|careers' is a sparse secondary tenant (4 jobs). External_Careers is the real, full board (F&A, consulting, AI/data roles). US-inclusive.

Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. on Greenhouse (job-boards.greenhouse.io/taketwo). Company name confirmed in feed = 'Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc.'. Corporate + studio roles (Rockstar/2K/Zynga umbrella). US-inclusive; full board = 34 postings.

Activision Blizzard retains its OWN Phenom career site (careers.activisionblizzard.com/widgets) despite being under Microsoft. Public POST /widgets API, no auth. Real Activision/Blizzard roles with US locations (San Francisco CA, Santa Monica CA) confirmed. Entity-check passes: distinct ActivisionBlizzard board, not Microsoft's. (Note: an activision.eightfold.ai tenant also exists but is locked/returns 0 without a tenant-specific domain param; Phenom is the working capture.)

HCLTech (HCL Technologies) on SAP SuccessFactors (jobs2web/J2W RMK platform; backend career55.sapsf.eu / hcm55.sapsf.eu). CSB HTML search is JS-rendered (no static rows), so the SF provider's RSS fallback resolves it: /services/rss/job?company=hcl returns 20 real HCLTech roles (PTC PLM, Full Stack Java Architect, Microsoft Solution Architect). siteid 'hcl' is the canonical RSS company id ('hcltech' also works). Global services firm, US-inclusive.
sample_titles: Full Stack Java Group Technical Architect
